reviews.comment:
Tanto la atención de los pisteros como la atención del chico del shop dejan mucho que desear. Mucha antipatía, a todos los clientes los tratan con desgano.
A cuidar a los clientes chicos!!! Después no lloren si se quedan sin trabajo!!! Reaccionen a tiempo!!!

(Translated by Google)
Both the service from the gas station attendants and the shop assistant leaves much to be desired. They're incredibly unfriendly and treat all customers with indifference. Take care of your customers, guys! Don't come crying to me later if you lose your jobs! React now!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR4a09HZ213RRAB

reviews.comment:
Generalmente el YPF shop está badtante lleno de gente. Los baños están Ok.

reviews.comment:

This place used to be a great rest stop along the way. Sadly, it's run down a lot.

It has a beautiful place to rest from the route and have some delicious mates.

reviews.comment:
Es un parador muy espacioso. Salvo fechas donde los contingentes la repletan, siempre tiene lugar para estar cómodo. Pero cuenta con muy pocos enchufes. Teniendo en cuenta que los turistas y visitantes necesitan cargar celulares, tablet, notebook...

(Translated by Google)
It's a very spacious lodge. Except for peak tourist periods, there's always plenty of room to relax. However, it has very few electrical outlets. Considering that tourists and visitors need to charge their cell phones, tablets, laptops, etc.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN4cTlDeHV3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Es mí parada preferida por los servicios y la atención

(Translated by Google)
It's my favorite stop because of the service and attention.

reviews.comment:
Mala atención, no muy limpio, lleno de moscas, no te dan servilletas, el wifi no conecta... Pasar de largo, estaciones hay muchas y mejores, el ACA 👎

(Translated by Google)
Poor service, not very clean, full of flies, they don't give you napkins, the Wi-Fi doesn't work... Just walk right past it, there are many better stations, the ACA 👎
